parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of fuzz applied to the signal. Can also affect tone, depending on the Attack knob's setting.
parameters-en.Attack: Increases the apparent attack of the signal, providing transient punch and a bit of additional gain.
parameters-en.Notch Freq: Adjusts the frequency at which the Notch Gain boosts or cuts.
parameters-en.Notch Gain: Cuts or boosts the signal at the Notch Frequency.
parameters-en.Thick: Adds a bit more thickness and low end to the fuzz, particularly if Drive is set lower.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
